title: Independent roadblock model squeeze and path adjustment

inputs.blocker: A733 SDMMC0 normal IDMAC stalls in descriptor-read state before descriptor word 0 is consumed.
known_good: CMD49 cache-enable via scoped PIO write
read-only EXT4 root mount when IDMA is bypassed

model_routes.result: Converged on TZMA/SPC, MBUS/QoS, IDMAC status/error masking, descriptor alignment, and CCU/IDMAC clock as the highest-value classes.
Converged on two proof routes: controlled descriptor-memory/security test and U-Boot IDMAC cross-validation.
Ranked source archaeology and firmware evidence above new runtime patching.
Task created through http://192.168.50.225:9120/api/plugins/kanban/tasks for independent roadblock triage.

model_routes.artifact: stale old LAN route http://192.168.50.248:9120/; current observed Framework LAN IP 192.168.50.140, Tailscale 100.64.0.5
model_routes.result: Route recorded as opportunistic only. Framework is not guaranteed always on; do not depend on it until live reachability and API access are verified.

decision.primary_path: Stop repeating descriptor geometry tests. First pursue source-backed security/firewall/interconnect/firmware-handoff evidence, especially any SPC/TZMA/MBUS/NSI/CCU register that names SMHC0 or its memory master.
decision.secondary_path: Create a lab-only PIO boot/runtime path if needed to keep Cubie userspace inspection moving. Treat it as diagnostic infrastructure, not an upstream fix.
decision.tertiary_path: Only attempt U-Boot IDMAC if a cheap public-source hook appears. Public U-Boot currently proves PIO/AHB access, not IDMAC descriptor fetch.

first_source_sweep.result: No source-backed SMHC0 firewall/fabric/security handoff bit was found in the cheap sweep. Public U-Boot still points to PIO/AHB transfer, not IDMAC descriptor fetch. H085 remains queued for deeper targeted artifact/manual search.

guardrails: Do not use the RTX 3090 route while the user ban is active.
Do not add vendor U-Boot DTS pollution.
Do not expand into Ethernet, VPU, display, USB-C, PCIe, or wireless.
Do not submit or rewrite public patches from this result alone.
